/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/interpreter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/builtins.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/emerald.dir/src/sql.cpp.o -o emerald
